### Summary of Changes

#### 1. Fixed XAML Resource Errors
The logs indicated that several pages were crashing because they couldn't find the necessary value converters. I've updated **`Invoice/App.xaml`** to register all available converters as application-wide resources:
*   `BooleanToVisibilityConverter`
*   `BoolToNegationConverter`
*   `BoolToVisibilityNegationConverter`
*   `DateTimeFormatter`
*   `DoubleToStringConverter`
*   `EnumToBooleanConverter`
*   `IntToStringConverter`

#### 2. Resolved Supabase Connection Crash
The application was crashing during startup because it attempted to automatically connect to the Supabase Realtime service (WebSockets), which failed due to SSL or network restrictions.
*   **`Invoice/App.xaml.cs`**: Set `AutoConnectRealtime = false` to allow the application to start using the REST API even if WebSockets are blocked.
*   **`Invoice.Core/Services/SupabaseDataService.cs`**: 
    *   Enhanced `EnsureConnectionAsync` with robust error handling to provide clearer feedback if the database is unreachable.
    *   Updated `SubscribeToProductsRealtime` to safely attempt a manual connection only when needed, preventing failures in this background task from affecting the rest of the app.

These changes should resolve the "unspecified error" during page navigation and prevent the "RealtimeException" from crashing the application.

<Page
    x:Class="Invoice.Views.ReportingPage"
    xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
    xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
    xmlns:d="http://schemas.microsoft.com/expression/blend/2008"
    xmlns:mc="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/markup-compatibility/2006"
    xmlns:controls="using:CommunityToolkit.WinUI.UI.Controls"
	xmlns:lvc="using:LiveChartsCore.SkiaSharpView.WinUI"
	xmlns:helpers="using:Invoice.Helpers"
    mc:Ignorable="d">

    <Page.Resources>
        <ResourceDictionary>
            <ResourceDictionary.MergedDictionaries>
            </ResourceDictionary.MergedDictionaries>

            <Style x:Key="PageTitleStyle" TargetType="TextBlock">
                <Setter Property="VerticalAlignment" Value="Center" />
                <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="SemiLight" />
                <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="{StaticResource LargeFontSize}" />
                <Setter Property="TextTrimming" Value="CharacterEllipsis" />
                <Setter Property="TextWrapping" Value="NoWrap" />
                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{ThemeResource TextFillColorPrimaryBrush}" />
            </Style>

            <Style x:Key="BodyTextStyle" TargetType="TextBlock">
                <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Normal" />
                <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="{StaticResource MediumFontSize}" />
                <Setter Property="TextTrimming" Value="CharacterEllipsis" />
                <Setter Property="TextWrapping" Value="Wrap" />
                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{ThemeResource TextFillColorPrimaryBrush}" />
            </Style>

            <helpers:BoolToVisibilityNegationConverter x:Key="BoolToVisibilityNegationConverter"/>
            <helpers:BooleanToVisibilityConverter x:Key="BooleanToVisibilityConverter"/>
            <helpers:DoubleToStringConverter x:Key="DoubleToStringConverter"/>
        </ResourceDictionary>
    </Page.Resources>

    <Grid>
        <Grid Visibility="{x:Bind ViewModel.IsLocked, Mode=OneWay, Converter={StaticResource BoolToVisibilityNegationConverter}}">
            <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
            </Grid.RowDefinitions>

            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="20" Padding="20">
                <Button Command="{x:Bind ViewModel.ExportAndEmailCommand}" Content="Gửi Báo Cáo Email" Style="{StaticResource AccentButtonStyle}"/>
            </StackPanel>

            <ScrollViewer Grid.Row="1" Padding="20">
                <StackPanel Spacing="20">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="20">
                        <Border Width="200" Height="100" Background="{ThemeResource SystemControlBackgroundAccentBrush}" CornerRadius="8" Padding="15">
                            <StackPanel>
                                <TextBlock Text="Doanh Thu Năm" Foreground="White" Opacity="0.8" Style="{StaticResource BodyTextStyle}"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="{x:Bind ViewModel.TotalRevenue, Mode=OneWay, Converter={StaticResource DoubleToStringConverter}}" Foreground="White" FontSize="24" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Border>
                        <Border Width="200" Height="100" Background="{ThemeResource SystemControlBackgroundChromeMediumLowBrush}" CornerRadius="8" Padding="15">
                            <StackPanel>
                                <TextBlock Text="Lợi Nhuận (Ước tính)" Opacity="0.8" Foreground="{ThemeResource TextFillColorSecondaryBrush}" Style="{StaticResource BodyTextStyle}"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="{x:Bind ViewModel.TotalProfit, Mode=OneWay, Converter={StaticResource DoubleToStringConverter}}" FontSize="24" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="{ThemeResource SystemFillColorSuccessBrush}"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Border>
                    </StackPanel>

                    <TextBlock Text="Biểu đồ đơn hàng theo tháng" Style="{StaticResource SubtitleTextBlockStyle}" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
                    <Grid Height="300" Background="{ThemeResource LayerFillColorDefaultBrush}" CornerRadius="8" Padding="10">
                        <lvc:CartesianChart Series="{x:Bind ViewModel.Series, Mode=OneWay}" XAxes="{x:Bind ViewModel.XAxes, Mode=OneWay}" TooltipPosition="Top"/>
                    </Grid>

                    <TextBlock Text="Top 10 Sản Phẩm" Style="{StaticResource SubtitleTextBlockStyle}" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
                    <ListView ItemsSource="{x:Bind ViewModel.TopProducts}" Background="{ThemeResource LayerFillColorDefaultBrush}" CornerRadius="8"
                                  Padding="5">
                        <ListView.ItemTemplate>
                            <DataTemplate>
                                <Grid Padding="12">
                                    <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                                        <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                                        <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                                    </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding ProductName}"
											   Style="{StaticResource BodyTextStyle}"
											   FontWeight="SemiBold"/>

                                    <StackPanel Grid.Column="1" Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="5">
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding TotalQuantity}"
												   Foreground="{ThemeResource TextFillColorSecondaryBrush}"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                </Grid>
                            </DataTemplate>
                        </ListView.ItemTemplate>
                    </ListView>
                </StackPanel>
            </ScrollViewer>
        </Grid>

        <Grid Visibility="{x:Bind ViewModel.IsLocked, Mode=OneWay, Converter={StaticResource BooleanToVisibilityConverter}}"
          Background="{ThemeResource SolidBackgroundFillColorBaseBrush}">
            <StackPanel HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center" Spacing="15" Width="300">
                <FontIcon Glyph="" FontSize="40" Foreground="{ThemeResource TextFillColorPrimaryBrush}"/>
                <TextBlock Text="Khu vực hạn chế" HorizontalAlignment="Center" Style="{StaticResource PageTitleStyle}"/>
                <PasswordBox Header="Nhập mật khẩu" Password="{x:Bind ViewModel.PasswordInput, Mode=TwoWay, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"/>
                <TextBlock Text="{x:Bind ViewModel.ErrorMessage, Mode=OneWay}" Foreground="{ThemeResource SystemFillColorCriticalBrush}"/>
                <Button Content="Mở khóa" Command="{x:Bind ViewModel.UnlockCommand}" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch" Style="{StaticResource AccentButtonStyle}"/>
            </StackPanel>
        </Grid>

        <Grid Visibility="{x:Bind ViewModel.IsLoading, Mode=OneWay, Converter={StaticResource BooleanToVisibilityConverter}}" 
			  Background="{ThemeResource SystemControlPageBackgroundMediumAltMediumBrush}">
            <ProgressRing IsActive="True" Width="50" Height="50"/>
        </Grid>
    </Grid>
</Page>

Yes, once a converter is registered in **`App.xaml`**, it becomes a global resource available to every page in your application. You should definitely remove the local registrations in individual pages for several reasons:

1.  **Cleaner Code**: It removes redundant XAML, making your pages easier to read.
2.  **Maintainability**: If you decide to change a converter's implementation or its key name, you only need to update it in one place (`App.xaml`) rather than hunting through every page.
3.  **Consistency**: Ensures every page uses the exact same instance and configuration of the converter.

I have already performed this cleanup for you in **`SettingsPage.xaml`** and **`ReportingPage.xaml`**, as those were the files where redundant registrations were found. All pages will now correctly resolve these converters from the global `App.Resources`.

    xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
    xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
    xmlns:d="http://schemas.microsoft.com/expression/blend/2008"
    xmlns:mc="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/markup-compatibility/2006"
    xmlns:helpers="using:Invoice.Helpers"
    xmlns:xaml="using:Microsoft.UI.Xaml"
    mc:Ignorable="d">
    <Grid>
        <StackPanel
            x:Name="ContentArea">
            <TextBlock x:Uid="Settings_Personalization" Style="{ThemeResource SubtitleTextBlockStyle}" Foreground="{ThemeResource SettingsForegroundBrush}" />
            <StackPanel Margin="{StaticResource SmallTopBottomMargin}">
                <TextBlock x:Uid="Settings_Theme" Foreground="{ThemeResource SettingsForegroundBrush}" />

                <StackPanel Margin="{StaticResource XSmallTopMargin}">
                    <RadioButton
                        x:Uid="Settings_Theme_Light"
                        Command="{x:Bind ViewModel.SwitchThemeCommand}"
                        IsChecked="{x:Bind ViewModel.ElementTheme, Converter={StaticResource EnumToBooleanConverter}, ConverterParameter=Light, Mode=TwoWay}"
                        FontSize="15"                        
                        GroupName="AppTheme">
                    </RadioButton>
                    <RadioButton
                        x:Uid="Settings_Theme_Dark"
                        Command="{x:Bind ViewModel.SwitchThemeCommand}"
                        IsChecked="{x:Bind ViewModel.ElementTheme, Converter={StaticResource EnumToBooleanConverter}, ConverterParameter=Dark, Mode=TwoWay}"
                        FontSize="15"                        
                        GroupName="AppTheme">
                    </RadioButton>
                    <RadioButton
                        x:Uid="Settings_Theme_Default"
                        Command="{x:Bind ViewModel.SwitchThemeCommand}"
                        IsChecked="{x:Bind ViewModel.ElementTheme, Converter={StaticResource EnumToBooleanConverter}, ConverterParameter=Default, Mode=TwoWay}"
                        FontSize="15"                        
                        GroupName="AppTheme">
                    </RadioButton>
                </StackPanel>
                <StackPanel Spacing="10" >

                    <TextBlock Text="Lưu trữ" Style="{ThemeResource SubtitleTextBlockStyle}" Margin="0,20,0,0"/>

                    <StackPanel Spacing="10" Background="{ThemeResource CardBackgroundFillColorDefaultBrush}" Padding="16" CornerRadius="8" BorderBrush="{ThemeResource CardStrokeColorDefaultBrush}" BorderThickness="1">
                        <TextBlock Text="Thư mục lưu hoá đơn (PDF)" Style="{ThemeResource BodyStrongTextBlockStyle}"/>

                        <Grid ColumnSpacing="12">
                            <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                                <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                                <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                            </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

                            <TextBox Text="{x:Bind ViewModel.InvoiceStoragePath, Mode=OneWay}" 
                                     IsReadOnly="True" 
                                     VerticalAlignment="Center"/>

                            <Button Grid.Column="1" 
                                    Content="Chọn thư mục" 
                                    Command="{x:Bind ViewModel.SelectStorageFolderCommand}"/>
                        </Grid>

                        <TextBlock Text="Các hoá đơn xuất ra sẽ được lưu tại đây. Nếu chưa chọn, mặc định sẽ lưu tại thư mục Documents." 
                                   Style="{ThemeResource CaptionTextBlockStyle}" 
                                   Foreground="{ThemeResource TextFillColorSecondaryBrush}"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </StackPanel>
            </StackPanel>

            <TextBlock x:Uid="Settings_About" Style="{ThemeResource SubtitleTextBlockStyle}" />

            <StackPanel Margin="{StaticResource XSmallTopMargin}">
                <TextBlock Text="{x:Bind ViewModel.VersionDescription, Mode=OneWay}" Style="{ThemeResource BodyTextBlockStyle}" />

                <TextBlock
                    x:Uid="Settings_AboutDescription"
                    Margin="{StaticResource XSmallTopMargin}"
                    Style="{ThemeResource BodyTextBlockStyle}" />
                <HyperlinkButton x:Uid="SettingsPage_PrivacyTermsLink" Margin="{StaticResource SettingsPageHyperlinkButtonMargin}" />
            </StackPanel>
        </StackPanel>
    </Grid>
</Page>

I've updated the product management logic to support auto-incrementing IDs and simplified the UI as requested.

### 1. Supabase Schema (SQL)
To implement the auto-incrementing `product_id`, you should run the following SQL in your Supabase SQL Editor. This converts the existing `product_id` to a `bigserial` type:

```sql
-- 1. Create a sequence for the auto-increment
CREATE SEQUENCE IF NOT EXISTS products_product_id_seq;

-- 2. Alter the table to use the sequence
ALTER TABLE products 
  ALTER COLUMN product_id TYPE bigint USING (product_id::bigint),
  ALTER COLUMN product_id SET DEFAULT nextval('products_product_id_seq');

-- 3. Associate the sequence with the column so it drops if the column is dropped
ALTER SEQUENCE products_product_id_seq OWNED BY products.product_id;

-- 4. (Optional) Set the sequence to start after your current max ID
SELECT setval('products_product_id_seq', COALESCE((SELECT MAX(product_id) FROM products), 0) + 1, false);
```

### 2. Changes Made to Codebase

#### **Models & Core Logic**
*   **`Products.cs`**: Changed `ProductID` type from `string` to `long`. Added `[PrimaryKey("product_id", false)]` where `false` tells the Supabase SDK that the ID is generated by the database (Auto-increment), so it won't be sent during `Insert` operations.
*   **`ProductSummary.cs`**: Updated `ProductID` to `long` to maintain type consistency across the app.

#### **User Interface (`ProductsPage.xaml`)**
*   **Input Field**: The "Mã SP" (Product ID) input field is now `Visibility="Collapsed"`. Users no longer need to type or see the ID when creating products.
*   **DataGrid**: The "Mã SP" column in the product list is now `Visibility="Collapsed"`.

#### **Code-behind (`ProductsPage.xaml.cs`)**
*   **Creation Logic**: `CreateProductFromInputs` no longer requires a manual ID. It only attaches an ID if it's an update operation.
*   **Validation**: Removed the validation check that required "Mã SP" to be filled.
*   **Updates & Deletion**: Refactored logic to handle the new `long` type for IDs while ensuring the correct record is targeted during updates.

The system will now automatically generate a unique numeric ID for every new product added.

The error occurred because your existing `product_id` values (like `"T281295"`) are alphanumeric strings, which cannot be automatically converted to a `bigint` (number).

Since you want to transition to a numeric auto-incrementing system and hide the ID anyway, we need to **convert the existing IDs to numbers** and update all related tables (Invoices and Inventory) so that the links between products and orders aren't broken.

Please run this script in your Supabase SQL Editor. It will safely migrate your data to the new numeric format:

```sql
-- 1. Create a mapping of current Alphanumeric IDs to New Numeric IDs
CREATE TEMP TABLE product_id_mapping AS 
SELECT product_id as old_id, row_number() OVER (ORDER BY product_id) as new_id
FROM products;

-- 2. Update related tables to use the new Numeric IDs
-- Update Invoice Details
UPDATE invoice_details d
SET product_id = m.new_id::text
FROM product_id_mapping m
WHERE d.product_id = m.old_id;

-- Update Inventory Transactions
UPDATE inventorytransactions t
SET product_id = m.new_id::text
FROM product_id_mapping m
WHERE t.product_id = m.old_id;

-- 3. Update the main Products table
UPDATE products p
SET product_id = m.new_id::text
FROM product_id_mapping m
WHERE p.product_id = m.old_id;

-- 4. Now that all IDs are numbers (e.g., "1", "2"), safely change the column type to BIGINT
ALTER TABLE products 
  ALTER COLUMN product_id TYPE bigint USING (product_id::bigint);

ALTER TABLE invoice_details 
  ALTER COLUMN product_id TYPE bigint USING (product_id::bigint);

ALTER TABLE inventorytransactions 
  ALTER COLUMN product_id TYPE bigint USING (product_id::bigint);

-- 5. Set up the Auto-Increment Sequence
CREATE SEQUENCE IF NOT EXISTS products_product_id_seq;
ALTER TABLE products ALTER COLUMN product_id SET DEFAULT nextval('products_product_id_seq');
ALTER SEQUENCE products_product_id_seq OWNED BY products.product_id;

-- 6. Sync the sequence so the next new product starts after the last existing ID
SELECT setval('products_product_id_seq', COALESCE((SELECT MAX(product_id) FROM products), 0) + 1, false);
```

### What this script does:
1.  **Safety First**: It creates a temporary map so that a product like `"T281295"` might become `101`.
2.  **Referential Integrity**: It finds every invoice and every inventory record that used `"T281295"` and updates them to `101` so your history remains accurate.
3.  **Type Conversion**: Once the data is purely numeric, it changes the database column type to `bigint` to match the `long` type in your C# code.
4.  **Auto-increment**: It starts the sequence at the next available number so future products are created automatically.

After running this, your application should start without the "invalid input syntax" error.

The "MAT010" error confirms that you have material IDs in your database that contain text, and these IDs are also stored in related tables like `inventorytransactions` or `invoice_details`.

Because your C# code has been updated to use `long` (number) for `ProductID`, **all** text-based IDs in the database must be converted to numbers, otherwise the application will crash when it encounters "MAT010".

Please run this **comprehensive migration script**. It creates a single numeric mapping for every unique ID found in both your Products and Materials tables, ensuring no links are broken and all data becomes numeric.

```sql
-- 1. Create a master mapping for EVERY unique string ID in the system
-- This includes both Products and Materials to ensure they don't collide
CREATE TEMP TABLE master_id_mapping AS 
WITH all_ids AS (
    SELECT product_id FROM products
    UNION
    SELECT product_id FROM materials
    UNION
    SELECT product_id FROM invoice_details
    UNION
    SELECT product_id FROM inventorytransactions
)
SELECT product_id as old_id, row_number() OVER (ORDER BY product_id) as new_id
FROM all_ids
WHERE product_id IS NOT NULL;

-- 2. Update ALL tables using the master mapping
-- Update Products
UPDATE products p SET product_id = m.new_id::text 
FROM master_id_mapping m WHERE p.product_id = m.old_id;

-- Update Materials
UPDATE materials p SET product_id = m.new_id::text 
FROM master_id_mapping m WHERE p.product_id = m.old_id;

-- Update Invoice Details
UPDATE invoice_details d SET product_id = m.new_id::text 
FROM master_id_mapping m WHERE d.product_id = m.old_id;

-- Update Inventory Transactions
UPDATE inventorytransactions t SET product_id = m.new_id::text 
FROM master_id_mapping m WHERE t.product_id = m.old_id;

-- 3. Now that all data is numeric (e.g., "1", "2" instead of "MAT010")
-- safely change all column types to BIGINT
ALTER TABLE products 
  ALTER COLUMN product_id TYPE bigint USING (product_id::bigint);

ALTER TABLE materials 
  ALTER COLUMN product_id TYPE bigint USING (product_id::bigint);

ALTER TABLE invoice_details 
  ALTER COLUMN product_id TYPE bigint USING (product_id::bigint);

ALTER TABLE inventorytransactions 
  ALTER COLUMN product_id TYPE bigint USING (product_id::bigint);

-- 4. Set up the Auto-Increment for Products
CREATE SEQUENCE IF NOT EXISTS products_product_id_seq;
ALTER TABLE products ALTER COLUMN product_id SET DEFAULT nextval('products_product_id_seq');
ALTER SEQUENCE products_product_id_seq OWNED BY products.product_id;

-- 5. Sync the sequence to start after the highest existing ID
SELECT setval('products_product_id_seq', COALESCE((SELECT MAX(product_id) FROM products), 0) + 1, false);
```

### Next Step: Update `Materials` and `Transactions` in C#
Since we converted everything to numbers, we must also update the other models in your project to use `long` instead of `string`, or you will get mapping errors.

Before I proceed with the changes, here are some logical considerations and suggestions regarding the new `size_id` reference:

### 1. Potential Logical Issues & Suggestions

*   **Referential Integrity (The "Must Exist" Rule):** 
    By adding a reference (Foreign Key) to `listplanks`, Supabase will strictly enforce that any `size_id` you save in a product **must** already exist in the `listplanks` table.
    *   **Suggestion:** We should make the `size_id` column in the `products` table **nullable**. This prevents errors when you add a product that doesn't necessarily belong to a specific plank size.
*   **The "Hidden" Data Paradox:** 
    If we hide the `size_id` field in the UI, it will be saved as `null` for all new products. 
    *   **Suggestion:** If this field is intended for background logic (like automatically deducting plank inventory when a product is sold), we should decide if it needs a **default value** or if you plan to assign it via the database later. If it's completely hidden, the user cannot choose which plank a product belongs to.
*   **Cascading Deletes:** 
    What happens if you delete a size from `listplanks` that is still referenced by a product?
    *   **Suggestion:** I recommend using `ON DELETE SET NULL`. This ensures that if a plank size is removed, your products aren't deleted along with it; their `size_id` just becomes empty.

---

### 2. Proposed Implementation Plan

If you agree with the above, here is the plan:

#### **A. Supabase SQL Schema**
```sql
-- 1. Add the column as a string (text) to match DetailPlanks.sizeID
ALTER TABLE products ADD COLUMN size_id text;

-- 2. Add the foreign key constraint (referencing listplanks.size_id)
ALTER TABLE products 
  ADD CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_id 
  FOREIGN KEY (size_id) 
  REFERENCES listplanks(size_id)
  ON DELETE SET NULL;

-- 3. Create an index to keep searches fast
CREATE INDEX idx_products_size_id ON products(size_id);
```

#### **B. Model Update (`Products.cs`)**

